results.name: VWAP Deviation (+1% below, +0.5% above)
results.describe: Buy when price drops 1%+ below VWAP. Sell when price > VWAP + 0.5%.

results.name: Mean Reversion + Trend (SMA 20)
results.describe: Buy when price is 3%+ below SMA20 AND price above SMA50 (uptrend confirmation). Sell at SMA20.

results.name: Short: RSI > 70 + EMA Death Cross
results.describe: SHORT when RSI > 70 AND EMA9 crosses below EMA21.

results.name: Breakout + ATR Volatility Filter
results.describe: Buy on 20-period high breakout with ATR confirmation. Exit on opposite signal.

results.name: EMA 9/21 Crossover
results.describe: Long when 9 EMA crosses above 21 EMA. Exit when reverse.

results.name: Bollinger Band Bounce
results.describe: Buy when price touches lower band. Sell at middle band.

results.name: MACD Histogram Reversal
results.describe: Buy when MACD histogram turns positive. Sell when negative.

results.name: Volume Spike + RSI Confirm
results.describe: Buy when volume > 2x average AND RSI < 40. Sell when RSI > 60.

results.name: EMA Trend (50) + RSI Filter
results.describe: Only long when price > EMA50 AND RSI < 40. Sell when RSI > 65.

results.name: RSI Reversal (Long < 30)
results.describe: Buy when RSI < 30 (oversold). Sell when RSI > 60.

results.name: RSI-7 Momentum Burst
results.describe: Buy when fast RSI(7) crosses above 50 from below. Sell when RSI(7) < 40.

results.name: Scalp: 5m VWAP Rebound
results.describe: Buy when 5m price rebounds from VWAP from below. Target +0.3%, stop -0.3%.
